ShortDescription.Value: Change blue outlines to any color or opacity. Surface layers on/off, District colors, and Guideline opacity.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Mochi's Hover Colors
- Change the blue outline color that has haunted every part of your city. - If you can hover over it then you can probably change it: buildings, cars, trees, cims, etc.! - Guidelines: change opacity so you can see items being placed and not just a thick white line! - Surfaces: turn off preview layers while using the Surface tool so you can see the real ground colors without a cloudy layer on top. - District tool: change the color + opacity of district borders and overlays, or turn them off completely.
## Important - Check the Options menu for bulldozer and road-tool color behavior. - To turn off panel tooltips, click the Info button in the top-left of the in-city panel. - **Darker panel** option. Recommended for LegacyUI or players who prefer darker high contrast. Try both panels and see what you like! - Alpha is transparency; it's the last bar on the color picker. - Tap preset 1 or 2 to switch your saved colors. - Change presets: select a color from the main color picker, then hold preset 1 or 2 until the fill bar completes. - Hotkeys are in the Options menu. Read the tooltips or Options Menu 3rd panel if you get lost. - Save-game safe and safe to remove any time. - No known compatibility issues. No Harmony patches.
### Feedback and Support
- Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. - This mod took many months to overcome many obstacles in game code. - If you like free mods made with love and lots of late night coffee, give a Like :)
### Credits - River-Mochi - modder/maintainer - Flashbond - collab, tech feedback, testing - yenyang - collab, tech feedback, testing - StarQ - tech feedback, testing - gagaxm - feature idea, testing - Dx, Necko1996, Noel, BugsyG, ElGendo87 - testing
### 14 Languages - English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski, 简体中文 , 한국어 - Português Brasil, 繁體中文 , 日本語 WIP: Thai ภาษาไทย, Vietnamese Tiếng Việt, Turkish Türkçe, EU Portuguese Português
tags: Mochi's blue scrubber, Highlight, border color, remove blue
Publish.ChangeLog: - UI/UX improvements - Options menu: add toggle to apply hover colors to overlapping items just like vanilla. default on. - added EU-portuguese translation. - updated translations.
